sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76181" key="o)fru/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφρῠ´-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76181.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rim</tr_> of socket of thigh-bone, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.118</biblScope> </bibl> (in pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
